option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.3-eclipse-temurin-21 AS builder WORKDIR /workspace
# Copiar todo el repo para construir el módulo CapaServicio (y sus dependencias) COPY . /workspace
# Construir el módulo de servicios (genera target/chat-empresarial.war) RUN mvn -B -pl CapaServicio -am -DskipTests package
FROM quay.io/wildfly/wildfly:29.0.1.Final
ENV WILDFLY_HOME=/opt/jboss/wildfly
# Copiar el .war generado COPY --from=builder /workspace/CapaServicio/target/chat-empresarial.war ${WILDFLY_HOME}/standalone/deployments/
# Descargar el driver de Postgres en la imagen para poder crear datasource en tiempo de arranque ARG POSTGRESQL_VERSION=42.7.2 RUN curl -L -o ${WILDFLY_HOME}/standalone/deployments/postgresql.jar \ https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/org/postgresql/postgresql/${POSTGRESQL_VERSION}/postgresql-${POSTGRESQL_VERSION}.jar
# Copiar script de configuración y hacerlo ejecutable COPY configure-and-run.sh ${WILDFLY_HOME}/bin/configure-and-run.sh RUN chmod +x ${WILDFLY_HOME}/bin/configure-and-run.sh
EXPOSE 8080
CMD ["/opt/jboss/wildfly/bin/configure-and-run.sh"]

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
services: - type: static name: chat-frontend env: node region: oregon branch: main buildCommand: "cd CapaPresentacion/Web && npm install && npm run build" publishCommand: "" staticPublishPath: "CapaPresentacion/Web/dist" envVars: - key: VITE_API_BASE_URL value: "https://<RENDER_BACKEND_URL>" - key: VITE_WS_BASE_URL value: "wss://<RENDER_BACKEND_URL>"
- type: web_service name: chat-backend env: docker region: oregon branch: main dockerfilePath: CapaServicio/Dockerfile envVars: - key: DB_HOST sync: false - key: DB_PORT value: "5432" - key: DB_NAME sync: false - key: DB_USER sync: false - key: DB_PASSWORD sync: false - key: JWT_SECRET sync: false plan: free
